---
title: "Complete Portfolio Animations"
subtitle: "All yesenia.io animations replicated in Quarto"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    theme: darkly
    css: portfolio-styles.css
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* Smooth scroll snap for movie-like effect */
html {
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
  scroll-snap-type: y mandatory;
  overflow-y: scroll;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

.section-container {
  min-height: 100vh;
  padding: 60px 20px;
  position: relative;
  scroll-snap-align: start;
  scroll-snap-stop: always;
}

.section-title {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 2.5em;
  margin-bottom: 40px;
  color: #4a90e2;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.nav-dots {
  position: fixed;
  right: 30px;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  z-index: 1000;
}

.nav-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  margin: 15px 0;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.3s;
}

.nav-dot:hover, .nav-dot.active {
  background: #4a90e2;
  transform: scale(1.3);
}

.tech-carousel {
  overflow: hidden;
  padding: 40px 0;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
  border-radius: 15px;
}

.carousel-track {
  display: flex;
  animation: scroll 30s linear infinite;
  gap: 30px;
}

.carousel-item {
  min-width: 80px;
  height: 80px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 15px;
  transition: transform 0.3s;
}

.carousel-item:hover {
  transform: scale(1.1);
  background: rgba(74, 144, 226, 0.2);
}

.carousel-item img {
  max-width: 50px;
  max-height: 50px;
  filter: brightness(0.9);
}

@keyframes scroll {
  0% { transform: translateX(0); }
  100% { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}

.gallery-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
  padding: 20px;
}

.gallery-item {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 15px;
  cursor: pointer;
  aspect-ratio: 1;
}

.gallery-item img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  transition: transform 0.5s ease;
}

.gallery-item:hover img {
  transform: scale(1.1);
}

.gallery-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.8));
  padding: 20px;
  transform: translateY(100%);
  transition: transform 0.3s;
  color: white;
}

.gallery-item:hover .gallery-overlay {
  transform: translateY(0);
}

.timeline {
  position: relative;
  max-width: 800px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 20px 0;
}

.timeline::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 4px;
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #4a90e2, #764ba2);
}

.timeline-item {
  margin-bottom: 50px;
  position: relative;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fadeInUp 0.6s forwards;
}

.timeline-item:nth-child(odd) {
  padding-right: 50%;
  text-align: right;
}

.timeline-item:nth-child(even) {
  padding-left: 50%;
  text-align: left;
}

.timeline-content {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
  padding: 20px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 2px solid #4a90e2;
  position: relative;
}

.timeline-dot {
  position: absolute;
  width: 20px;
  height: 20px;
  background: #4a90e2;
  border-radius: 50%;
  top: 20px;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  border: 4px solid #1a1a2e;
  z-index: 1;
}

@keyframes fadeInUp {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(30px);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
}

.stats-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
  gap: 30px;
  padding: 40px 20px;
}

.stat-card {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(74, 144, 226, 0.1), rgba(118, 75, 162, 0.1));
  padding: 30px;
  border-radius: 15px;
  text-align: center;
  border: 2px solid rgba(74, 144, 226, 0.3);
  transition: all 0.3s;
}

.stat-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-10px);
  border-color: #4a90e2;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(74, 144, 226, 0.3);
}

.stat-number {
  font-size: 3em;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #4a90e2;
  margin: 10px 0;
}

.stat-label {
  font-size: 1.1em;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.particle-bg {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  z-index: -1;
}
</style>
```

<!-- Navigation Dots -->
```{=html}
<div class="nav-dots">
  <div class="nav-dot active" onclick="scrollToSection(0)"></div>
  <div class="nav-dot" onclick="scrollToSection(1)"></div>
  <div class="nav-dot" onclick="scrollToSection(2)"></div>
  <div class="nav-dot" onclick="scrollToSection(3)"></div>
  <div class="nav-dot" onclick="scrollToSection(4)"></div>
  <div class="nav-dot" onclick="scrollToSection(5)"></div>
</div>
```

## Section 1: Interactive Bubble Chart {#bubble-section}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

d3 = require("d3@7")

// Bubble data
bubbleData = [
  {id: 1, name: "Python", category: "Programming", value: 95, icon: "🐍"},
  {id: 2, name: "AWS", category: "Cloud", value: 90, icon: "☁️"},
  {id: 3, name: "CI/CD", category: "DevOps", value: 88, icon: "�"},
  {id: 4, name: "Docker", category: "DevOps", value: 85, icon: "🐳"},
  {id: 5, name: "GitHub Actions", category: "DevOps", value: 85, icon: "⚙️"},
  {id: 6, name: "Data Engineering", category: "Data", value: 92, icon: "📊"},
  {id: 7, name: "Terraform", category: "IaC", value: 75, icon: "🏗️"},
  {id: 8, name: "ML/AI", category: "AI", value: 80, icon: "🤖"},
  {id: 9, name: "PostgreSQL", category: "Database", value: 82, icon: "🐘"},
  {id: 10, name: "Step Functions", category: "Orchestration", value: 88, icon: "🔀"},
  {id: 11, name: "Lambda", category: "Serverless", value: 90, icon: "λ"},
  {id: 12, name: "Kubernetes", category: "DevOps", value: 70, icon: "☸️"}
]

bubbleWidth = 900
bubbleHeight = 600
bubbleCenterX = bubbleWidth * 0.5
bubbleCenterY = bubbleHeight * 0.5

bubbleNodes = bubbleData.map(d => ({
  ...d,
  x: bubbleCenterX + (Math.random() - 0.5) * bubbleWidth * 0.8,
  y: bubbleCenterY + (Math.random() - 0.5) * bubbleHeight * 0.8,
  r: 0,
  radius: Math.sqrt(d.value) * 6,
  fx: null,
  fy: null
}))

bubbleSimulation = d3.forceSimulation(bubbleNodes)
  .force('charge', d3.forceManyBody().strength(5))
  .force('collide', d3.forceCollide(d => d.r + 3))
  .force('x', d3.forceX(bubbleCenterX).strength(0.05))
  .force('y', d3.forceY(bubbleCenterY).strength(0.05))

bubbleChart = {
  const svg = d3.create("svg")
    .attr("width", bubbleWidth)
    .attr("height", bubbleHeight)
    .style("background", "linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%)")
    .style("border-radius", "15px");

  let focusedNode = null;

  const node = svg.selectAll(".node")
    .data(bubbleNodes)
    .join("g")
    .attr("class", "node")
    .style("cursor", "pointer");

  node.append("circle")
    .attr("r", 0)
    .style("fill", "#fff")
    .style("stroke", "#333")
    .style("stroke-width", 2)
    .transition()
    .duration(2000)
    .delay((d, i) => i * 100)
    .ease(d3.easeElasticOut)
    .attr("r", d => d.radius);

  node.append("text")
    .attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("dy", "0.35em")
    .style("font-size", d => `${d.radius * 0.6}px`)
    .style("pointer-events", "none")
    .text(d => d.icon);

  node.on("click", function(event, d) {
    event.stopPropagation();
    if (d === focusedNode) return;
    
    if (focusedNode) {
      d3.transition().duration(1500)
        .tween("reset", () => {
          const ir = d3.interpolateNumber(focusedNode.r, focusedNode.radius);
          return t => { focusedNode.r = ir(t); };
        });
    }
    
    focusedNode = d;
    node.style("opacity", n => n === d ? 1 : 0.3);
    
    d3.transition().duration(1500)
      .tween("zoom", () => {
        const ix = d3.interpolateNumber(d.x, bubbleCenterX);
        const iy = d3.interpolateNumber(d.y, bubbleCenterY);
        const ir = d3.interpolateNumber(d.r, 100);
        return t => {
          d.x = ix(t);
          d.y = iy(t);
          d.r = ir(t);
        };
      });
  });

  svg.on("click", () => {
    if (focusedNode) {
      d3.transition().duration(1500)
        .tween("reset", () => {
          const ir = d3.interpolateNumber(focusedNode.r, focusedNode.radius);
          return t => { focusedNode.r = ir(t); };
        });
      focusedNode = null;
      node.style("opacity", 1);
    }
  });

  bubbleSimulation.on("tick", () => {
    node.attr("transform", d => `translate(${d.x},${d.y})`);
    node.select("circle").attr("r", d => d.r || d.radius);
  });

  bubbleNodes.forEach((d, i) => {
    setTimeout(() => { d.r = d.radius; }, i * 100);
  });

  return svg.node();
}
```

---

## Section 2: Tech Stack Carousel {#carousel-section}

```{=html}
<div class="section-container">
  <h2 class="section-title">Technologies & Tools - DevOps & Data Engineering Focus</h2>
  <div class="tech-carousel">
    <div class="carousel-track">
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/python/python-original.svg" alt="Python"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/amazonwebservices/amazonwebservices-original-wordmark.svg" alt="AWS"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/docker/docker-original.svg" alt="Docker"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/kubernetes/kubernetes-plain.svg" alt="Kubernetes"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/github/github-original.svg" alt="GitHub Actions"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/terraform/terraform-original.svg" alt="Terraform"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/postgresql/postgresql-original.svg" alt="PostgreSQL"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/git/git-original.svg" alt="Git"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/linux/linux-original.svg" alt="Linux"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/jenkins/jenkins-original.svg" alt="Jenkins"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/gitlab/gitlab-original.svg" alt="GitLab CI"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/apache/apache-original.svg" alt="Apache Airflow"></div>
      <!-- Duplicate for seamless loop -->
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/python/python-original.svg" alt="Python"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/amazonwebservices/amazonwebservices-original-wordmark.svg" alt="AWS"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/docker/docker-original.svg" alt="Docker"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/kubernetes/kubernetes-plain.svg" alt="Kubernetes"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/github/github-original.svg" alt="GitHub Actions"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/terraform/terraform-original.svg" alt="Terraform"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/postgresql/postgresql-original.svg" alt="PostgreSQL"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/git/git-original.svg" alt="Git"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/linux/linux-original.svg" alt="Linux"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/jenkins/jenkins-original.svg" alt="Jenkins"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/gitlab/gitlab-original.svg" alt="GitLab CI"></div>
      <div class="carousel-item"><img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/apache/apache-original.svg" alt="Apache Airflow"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Section 3: Experience Timeline {#timeline-section}

```{=html}
<div class="section-container">
  <h2 class="section-title">Professional Journey</h2>
  <div class="timeline">
    <div class="timeline-item" style="animation-delay: 0.1s">
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-content">
        <h3>Senior Data Engineer</h3>
        <h4>TeamStation AI</h4>
        <p class="timeline-date">May 2025 - Present</p>
        <p>Built data lake from scratch with medallion architecture (AWS Glue, Step Functions, Lambda). Implemented <strong>CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions</strong> for automated deployments. Integrated AI-powered BI tools with natural language querying. <strong>Infrastructure as Code</strong> with automated testing and deployment workflows.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="timeline-item" style="animation-delay: 0.2s">
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-content">
        <h3>Data Engineer</h3>
        <h4>Previous Company</h4>
        <p class="timeline-date">2022 - 2025</p>
        <p>Developed ETL pipelines with <strong>automated CI/CD workflows</strong>. Implemented <strong>Docker containerization</strong> and orchestration. Built <strong>GitHub Actions pipelines</strong> for continuous integration and deployment. Optimized database performance and infrastructure automation.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="timeline-item" style="animation-delay: 0.3s">
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-content">
        <h3>Junior Developer</h3>
        <h4>Startup Inc</h4>
        <p class="timeline-date">2020 - 2022</p>
        <p>Full-stack development with React and Node.js. Built RESTful APIs and responsive web applications.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="timeline-item" style="animation-delay: 0.4s">
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-content">
        <h3>BSc Computer Science</h3>
        <h4>University</h4>
        <p class="timeline-date">2016 - 2020</p>
        <p>Graduated with honors. Focus on data structures, algorithms, and machine learning.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Section 4: Project Gallery {#gallery-section}

```{=html}
<div class="section-container">
  <h2 class="section-title">Featured Projects</h2>
  <div class="gallery-grid">
    <div class="gallery-item">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551434678-e076c223a692?w=500" alt="CI/CD Pipeline">
      <div class="gallery-overlay">
        <h4>CI/CD Pipeline Automation</h4>
        <p>GitHub Actions + Docker + K8s</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558494949-ef010cbdcc31?w=500" alt="Cloud Infrastructure">
      <div class="gallery-overlay">
        <h4>AWS Data Lake</h4>
        <p>Medallion architecture with IaC</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1460925895917-afdab827c52f?w=500" alt="Infrastructure">
      <div class="gallery-overlay">
        <h4>Infrastructure as Code</h4>
        <p>Terraform + AWS automation</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504639725590-34d0984388bd?w=500" alt="Orchestration">
      <div class="gallery-overlay">
        <h4>Step Functions Orchestration</h4>
        <p>Serverless workflow automation</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1555949963-aa79dcee981c?w=500" alt="Containerization">
      <div class="gallery-overlay">
        <h4>Container Orchestration</h4>
        <p>Docker + Kubernetes deployment</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item">
      <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551288049-bebda4e38f71?w=500" alt="Monitoring">
      <div class="gallery-overlay">
        <h4>Monitoring & Observability</h4>
        <p>CloudWatch + automated alerts</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Section 5: Stats & Metrics {#stats-section}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

statsChart = {
  const data = [
    { label: "Projects", value: 50, icon: "📁" },
    { label: "Commits", value: 5000, icon: "💻" },
    { label: "Stars", value: 250, icon: "⭐" },
    { label: "Years Exp", value: 6, icon: "📅" }
  ];
  
  const container = d3.create("div")
    .attr("class", "stats-grid");
  
  const cards = container.selectAll(".stat-card")
    .data(data)
    .join("div")
    .attr("class", "stat-card")
    .style("opacity", 0)
    .html(d => `
      <div style="font-size: 3em;">${d.icon}</div>
      <div class="stat-number">0</div>
      <div class="stat-label">${d.label}</div>
    `);
  
  // Animate in
  cards.transition()
    .duration(800)
    .delay((d, i) => i * 200)
    .style("opacity", 1);
  
  // Count up animation
  cards.each(function(d, i) {
    const card = d3.select(this);
    const numberEl = card.select(".stat-number");
    
    setTimeout(() => {
      d3.transition()
        .duration(2000)
        .tween("count", () => {
          const interpolate = d3.interpolateNumber(0, d.value);
          return t => {
            numberEl.text(Math.round(interpolate(t)));
          };
        });
    }, i * 200);
  });
  
  return container.node();
}
```

---

## Section 6: Contact Form {#contact-section}

```{=html}
<div class="section-container">
  <h2 class="section-title">Get In Touch</h2>
  <div style="max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;">
    <form id="contactForm" style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); padding: 40px; border-radius: 15px; border: 2px solid rgba(74, 144, 226, 0.3);">
      <div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
        <label style="display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #4a90e2;">Name</label>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Your name" style="width: 100%; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: white;">
      </div>
      <div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
        <label style="display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #4a90e2;">Email</label>
        <input type="email" placeholder="your@email.com" style="width: 100%; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: white;">
      </div>
      <div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
        <label style="display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #4a90e2;">Message</label>
        <textarea rows="5" placeholder="Your message..." style="width: 100%; padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: white; resize: vertical;"></textarea>
      </div>
      <button type="submit" style="width: 100%; padding: 15px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea, #764ba2); border: none; border-radius: 8px; color: white; font-size: 1.1em; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.transform='scale(1.05)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='scale(1)'">
        Send Message
      </button>
    </form>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// Smooth scroll to section
function scrollToSection(index) {
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.section-container, #bubble-section');
  sections[index]?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
  
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-dot').forEach((dot, i) => {
    dot.classList.toggle('active', i === index);
  });
}

// Intersection Observer for fade-in animations
const observerOptions = {
  threshold: 0.2,
  rootMargin: '0px 0px -100px 0px'
};

const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      entry.target.style.opacity = '1';
      entry.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
    }
  });
}, observerOptions);

// Observe all sections
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.section-container, #bubble-section');
  sections.forEach(section => {
    section.style.opacity = '0';
    section.style.transform = 'translateY(30px)';
    section.style.transition = 'opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease';
    observer.observe(section);
  });
});

// Update active dot on scroll
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.section-container, #bubble-section');
  const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-dot');
  
  sections.forEach((section, index) => {
    const rect = section.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (rect.top <= 100 && rect.bottom >= 100) {
      dots.forEach((dot, i) => {
        dot.classList.toggle('active', i === index);
      });
    }
  });
});

// Form submission
document.getElementById('contactForm').addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  alert('Message sent! (Demo only)');
});
</script>
```
